compiled_state.title: [TDD exemption]: external-deliverable task closed under GREEN exemption with no out-of-repo verification gate -> task marked complete while GitHub artifact never created
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

Task 0e30-57fd (under story caf7-e03d, epic baff-7163) was closed with testing_mode: GREEN and the exemption criterion 'scaffolding task — no behavioral contract assertable in this repo's test suite'. The task's deliverable was a public GitHub repository (navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template) forked from navapbc/template-application-nextjs. The repo was never actually created. The task's own Acceptance Criteria included 'Verify: gh repo view dso-org/template-application-nextjs --json name,visibility | grep -q public (or manual confirmation that repo exists and is public)' — a verification step that was never executed, and that the closure workflow had no mechanism to enforce.

## Reproduction

1. ticket show 0e30-57fd — note testing_mode: GREEN, status: closed
2. curl -I https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template — returns 404
3. No sprint, completion-verifier, or review step ever blocked closure.

## Impact

Every user running scripts/create-dso-app.sh sees 'fatal: repository not found'. The epic shipped fully non-functional at its external boundary.

## Root Cause Hypothesis

The TDD exemption path (testing_mode: GREEN for scaffolding tasks that produce external artifacts) has no paired 'external-state verification' gate. GREEN tasks whose deliverables live outside the repo have no scheduled step that asserts the external artifact actually exists before closure is accepted.

## Scope

Surface: /dso:implementation-plan (testing_mode classification), /dso:sprint (story/task closure), dso:completion-verifier (epic SC verification), TDD exemption rules in testing-modes documentation.

## References

- Task 0e30-57fd (closed, no external verification ran)
- Story caf7-e03d (closed, parent story)
- Epic baff-7163 (closed, epic shipped non-functional)
- Related open epic 3d19-ea1d (Planning pipeline: external-dependency classification and manual-step handshake) — would, once implemented, formalize this gap.

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything): TDD exemption — requires policy discussion on external-deliverable verification gates. Deferred to end-of-session user review.
comments.author: Test
